headline: OMAH Promises Monthly Income From Berkshire Holdings, With One Major Catch
summary: VistaShares Target 15 Berkshire Select Income ETF (NYSEARCA:OMAH) promises something Berkshire Hathaway itself has never offered: a monthly paycheck. By mirroring Berkshire’s top equity holdings and selling covered call options against those positions, the fund targets roughly 15% in annual income. Since its March 4, 2025 launch, it has grown to nearly $690 million in ... OMAH Promises Monthly Income From Berkshire Holdings, With One Major Catch

headline: American Express Blends AI Card Launch And Gold Anniversary Brand Play
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has introduced the Graphite Business Cash Unlimited Card, featuring cash back rewards and AI-powered financial tools for business customers. The company is marking 60 years of the Gold Card with a limited-edition resortwear collaboration with STAUD and related special offers for card members. For American Express, these moves sit at the intersection of payments, software, and lifestyle branding. The new business card brings AI tools directly into expense...
